stories.title: Trump says U.S. military has rescued airman shot down over Iran
stories.description: A U.S. Airforce officer whose plane was shot down in Iran was rescued by U.S. forces early Sunday after evading capture for more than a day in enemy territory, President Trump announced on social media.

stories.title: U.S. searches for airman shot down in Iran, while Trump posts ultimatum
stories.description: At the start of the sixth week of war, U.S. forces search for a missing airman and President Trump reiterates his ultimatum for Iran to open the Straight of Hormuz.

stories.title: Iran war enters its 6th week as military searches for downed jet crew member
stories.description: The war in Iran enters its 6th week as the search continues for the missing U.S. service member who bailed out of a fighter jet shot down over Iran on Friday.

stories.title: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
stories.description: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

stories.title: Search for missing airman presents serious test for US
stories.description: The stakes could rise further if the weapons system officer of the downed F15 Eagle plane is captured by Iran.

stories.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
stories.description: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

stories.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

stories.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
stories.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

stories.title: International law experts allege violations in Iran war
stories.description: The White House says it is making the entire region safer by eliminating short and long-term threats.

stories.title: 'This has got me worried': Iranians fear what comes next after US strike on Karaj bridge
stories.description: President Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges and electric power plants if its leaders do not agree to his terms to end the war.

stories.title: Iran's focus on survival means same regime still firmly in place
stories.description: Tehran is showing resilience despite Trump's claims of regime change, writes BBC Persian editor Amir Azimi.

stories.title: 'I haven't slept for days': Iranians describe mounting desperation after a month of war
stories.description: Ordinary people from various parts of Iran describe expanding strikes, economic pain and fear of repression.

stories.title: Iran's two largest steel plants shut down due to air strikes, companies say
stories.description: The strikes, which Iran says were first launched by Israel in co-ordination with the US last week, could cause major damage to the Iranian economy.

stories.title: 'Be serious... don't speak every day': Macron criticises Trump approach to Iran war
stories.description: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.

stories.title: Iranian Nobel laureate suffered suspected heart attack in prison, family says
stories.description: Narges Mohammadi's brother says he fears her life is in imminent danger and she needs to be transferred to a hospital.

stories.title: UK and allies discuss sanctions to stop Iran blocking Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Yvette Cooper said coordinated diplomatic and economic measures are required to reopen the shipping lane.

stories.title: Trump says Iran war objectives 'nearing completion' in address to nation
stories.description: The US president's first televised address of the conflict with Iran did little to quell uneasy markets.

stories.title: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration's timelines
stories.description: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

stories.title: Oman, Iran discuss smooth transit in Strait of Hormuz, Muscat says
stories.description: The talks focus on a 'smooth passage' through the Strait of Hormuz, as Tehran effectively blocks the vital waterway.

stories.title: “We blame Trump”: Drivers line up for free gas as prices surge in the US
stories.description: Drivers lined up for free gas in Chicago as fuel prices surge, driven by the US-Israeli war on Iran.

stories.title: US pilot from downed F-15E plane rescued in Iran: What we know
stories.description: The second pilot from the fighter jet shot down in Iran is rescued by US rescue forces after 48 hours.

stories.title: Kuwait’s power, water plants damaged as Iran keeps attacking Gulf states
stories.description: Bahrain and the UAE also reported attacks resulting in fires, which were put out quickly.

stories.title: Thousands rally in Iraq against ‘senseless’ US-Israel war on Iran
stories.description: Protesters chant against the US and Israel, urging the global community to confront their actions in the Middle East.

stories.title: Trump seeks to end the war without it becoming ‘an abject failure’
stories.description: Barbara Slavin of the Stimson Center says Trump misread the situation in Iran and now scrambles for a way out.

stories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 37 of US-Israeli attacks?
stories.description: A US crew member who has been missing since Iran shot down a fighter jet has been rescued, President Donald Trump says.

stories.title: Yemen’s Houthis claim cluster missile attack on Israel’s Ben Gurion airport
stories.description: Yemen’s Houthi military spokesman has claimed responsibility for a strike on Israel’s Ben Gurion airport in Jaffa.

stories.title: ‘Miraculous’: US rescues second pilot downed in Iran, Trump confirms
stories.description: Iran claims another US aircraft involved in the rescue of the F-15 fighter pilot has been shot down.

stories.title: Trump’s unpopular war on Iran
stories.description: Most Americans oppose the US-Israel war on Iran. ​​No recent US war has ever started off being this unpopular.

stories.title: Iran says Iraqi ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as transits tick up
stories.description: Tehran says Iraq will face no restrictions in waterway, praising country's 'struggle' against the US.

stories.title: US satellite firm Planet Labs announces blackout on war on Iran images
stories.description: Company says move amid US-Israel war on Iran comes after a request from the US government.

stories.title: Iran war live: Iran claims downing of 2 US planes; Hormuz ‘deadline’ looms
stories.description: Tehran says shot down two US C-130 planes, two helicopters, as Iran's infrastructure attacks cause fires across Gulf.

stories.title: US forces rescue 2 airmen downed in Iran; Trump says crew member injured but ‘safe’
stories.description: United States President Donald Trump said on Sunday that US forces had safely recovered a second airman downed in Iran, calling it “one of the most daring search and rescue operations in US history”. The announcement came as Iran launched missiles and drones at Israel and Kuwait ...

stories.title: EU urged to drop sanctions on import of Russian oil and gas
stories.description: WARSAW: The European Union should end sanctions on Russian oil and gas imports, take steps to restore Druzhba oil pipeline flows and end the war in Ukraine to tackle the energy crisis stemming from the war in Iran, Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico said on Saturday. Fico said in ...

stories.title: US president weighs broader cabinet shake-up
stories.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump is considering a bro­ader cabinet shake-up in the wake of Attorney General Pam Bondi’s removal this week, as he grows increasingly frustrated with the political fallout from the war with Iran, five people familiar with internal White House di...

stories.title: Tehran says Islamabad talks depend on terms and conditions of any negotiations
stories.description: https://www.dawn.com/news/1988683

stories.title: Trump asks Tehran to ‘make a deal or open up’ Hormuz; warns he would ‘rain down hell’ on Iran
stories.description: https://www.dawn.com/news/1988682/trump-warns-of-hell-as-iran-fights-back

stories.title: Israeli strikes hit hospital, homes in south Lebanon
stories.description: • UN official says Israeli forces destroy 17 surveillance cameras linked agency’s office in Naqura• Indonesia receives bodies of three peacekeepers slain by Israel BEIRUT: Israel’s military renewed its strikes on the southern Lebanese city of Tyre on Saturday, severely damaging b...

stories.title: European drivers choke on rising diesel prices
stories.description: PARIS: The price of diesel fuel has rocketed by more than 30 per cent across Europe since the start of the Middle East war highlighting the continent’s dependence on imported energy and the lingering prominence of diesel on the car market. The Easter holiday weekend across Europe...

stories.title: US arrests relatives of top Iranian commander assassinated in 2020 strike on Baghdad
stories.description: Two family members of Iranian general Qassem Soleimani, who was assassinated in 2020, have been arrested in the United States after their residency permits were rescinded, the State Department said on Saturday. “Last night, the niece and grandniece of deceased Iranian Revolutiona...

stories.title: Virginia Giuffre’s family urges King Charles to meet Epstein survivors during US visit
stories.description: The family of Jeffrey Epstein accuser Virginia Giuffre on Saturday urged Britain’s King Charles to meet with survivors during his state visit to the United States later this month, saying the trip coincides with the anniversary of her death. In a statement shared with Reuters, Sk...

stories.title: Iran, US race to find crew member of crashed American fighter jet
stories.description: Iran’s forces were hunting on Saturday for a missing United States pilot from one of two warplanes downed over Iran and the Gulf, officials from both sides said, while two airmen were rescued. The incidents show the risks still facing US and Israeli aircraft over Iran as the war ...

stories.title: UNSC divided as Gulf pushes to reopen Hormuz
stories.description: • Vote on Bahrain-led, US-backed resolution postponed twice• Russia, China raise objections to certain parts• Iran warns against ‘provocative move’ UNITED NATIONS: The UN Security Council remains sharply divided over a Gulf Arab initiative to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, the stra...

stories.title: 10 killed as Russia launches daytime attacks on Ukraine
stories.description: KYIV: Russian strikes killed at least 10 people in Ukraine on Friday, officials said, as Moscow launched the latest in an increasing number of daytime barrages. Moscow has been firing aerial broadsides at Ukraine throughout its more than four-year invasion, mostly at night, but i...

stories.title: ‘Silence’ stonewalls Pakistan-led US-Iran talks initiative
stories.description: ISLAMABAD: A Pakistan-led initiative to facilitate US-Iran talks has been held up, with Tehran yet to formally respond to proposals for dialogue despite back channel exchanges in recent days, a senior official told Dawn on Friday. The official, who was speaking on background, sai...

stories.title: Four ships cross Hormuz as Iran says it is drafting protocol
stories.description: LONDON: Four ships, including one co-owned by a Japanese company and one by a French company, crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday as Iran said it is drafting a peacetime protocol to supervise maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz with Oman. The near closing of the St...

stories.title: Putin, Erdogan call for immediate ceasefire in Middle East war
stories.description: • Leaders warn of ‘serious’ global consequences for energy, trade, logistics• Talks also cover coordinated security measures for the Black Sea area MOSCOW: Russian Pre­si­dent Vladimir Putin and Turkish counterpart Recep Tayyip Erdogan called for an immediate ceasefire in the Mid...

stories.title: Iran-Israel war LIVE: Israeli intelligence helped U.S. airman rescue mission in Iran, says official
stories.description: Hezbollah on Sunday, April 5, said it had targeted an Israeli warship with a cruise missile; Trump claimed that two U.S. airmen were rescued in Iran after he set a deadline for a deal

stories.title: Aid groups warn war in West Asia is hindering food, medicine from reaching millions
stories.description: Key pathways such as the Strait of Hormuz have been effectively shuttered and routes from strategic hubs such as Dubai, Doha and Abu Dhabi have also been impacted; transport costs have spiked with higher fuel and insurance rates, meaning less supplies can be delivered with the sa...

stories.title: Satellite firm Planet Labs to indefinitely withhold Iran war images
stories.description: California-based Planet Labs announced the decision in an email to customers and said the U.S. government had asked all ‌satellite imagery providers to indefinitely withhold images of the conflict region.

stories.title: Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make deal or face ‘Hell’
stories.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's latest threat came after a strike near an Iranian nuclear power plant prompted evacuations, with the Revolutionary Guards saying they hit a commercial ship in Bahrain allegedly linked to Israel

stories.title: U.S. rescues airman whose F-15 was downed in Iran, say U.S. officials
stories.description: The U.S. President said the ‌United ⁠States Military ⁠pulled off one of the ‘most daring ​Search ‌and Rescue Operations in U.S. History’

stories.title: For Trump, the cost of Iran war is rising
stories.description: At least six KC-135s were damaged in two Iranian missile and drone attacks at the Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia; The U.S. has also lost at least 12 MQ-9 Reaper drones since the war began, according to some reports

stories.title: Iran war starts pinching U.S.; gas prices, transport costs surge
stories.description: The average price of petrol in the U.S. has increased to $4.09 a gallon on Friday (April 3, 2026), up more than one dollar from just before the war and the highest level since August 2022

stories.title: Kuwait power, water desalination plants damaged by Iranian attack: government
stories.description: Iran’s army said it was targeting “aluminum industries” in the UAE and U.S. military infrastructure in Kuwait, the official IRNA news agency reported

stories.title: Iran FM Araghchi warns of contamination risk after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Bushehr nuclear power plant
stories.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that continued attacks on the plant on Iran's southern coast could eventually lead to radioactive fallout that would "end life in GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) capitals, not Tehran"; Bushehr is considerably closer to Kuwait, Bahrain...

stories.title: Iran command rejects Trump's ‘helpless, nervous’ ultimatum
stories.description: General Ali Abdollahi Aliabadi, in a statement from the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, said Mr. Trump's threat was a "a helpless, nervous, unbalanced and stupid action"

stories.title: Iran-Israel war updates: Trump says Iran military leaders killed in Tehran strike
stories.description: "Many of Iran's Military Leaders, who have led them poorly and unwisely, are terminated, along with much else, with this massive strike in Tehran!" U.S. President Donald Trump wrote on his Truth Social platform.

stories.title: Iran’s uranium enrichment secures independence, peaceful atom — supreme leader
stories.description: Ali Khamenei added that the US and other countries are not interested in Iran's progress and have put forward conditions presupposing a complete halt of uranium enrichment on Iranian territory

stories.title: Tehran could weigh nuclear deal with US with Iran-based enrichment consortium — Axios
stories.description: According to the report, a sixth round of talks on the Iranian nuclear program between the US president’s Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Iran’s top diplomat, Abbas Araghchi, could be held this weekend in a Middle Eastern country

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
